# blecs.continue-backend

Run `/continue-backend` process for iterative backend implementation work.

This is a thin discoverability wrapper.
For actual workflow loops, stop conditions, and reporting formats, you MUST read and follow `.copilot/skills/continue-backend-workflow/SKILL.md`.

Do not apply arbitrary domain rules here; this agent delegates entirely to core `resolve-issue` and `pr-merge` workflows.
